finding_families.yaml: YAML parse, load, and candidate-structure failures.
finding_families.acceptance: Atomicity, refinement-acceptance, and semantic quality failures.
finding_families.artifact: Runtime artifact integrity, queue, and proposal artifact failures.
finding_families.executor_environment: Transport, timeout, MCP startup, and provider runtime failures.
finding_families.metadata: Spec identity and lifecycle metadata drift findings.

error_classes.relation_failure: Graph relation or dependency consistency failure.
error_classes.semantic_rejection: Refinement was structurally produced but semantically rejected.
error_classes.scope_violation: Write scope or requested authority was exceeded.
error_classes.artifact_integrity_failure: Derived artifact or proposal artifact is malformed or unsafe.
error_classes.protocol_failure: Executor machine protocol markers are missing or invalid.
error_classes.runtime_failure: Executor runtime failed before a trustworthy bounded result.
error_classes.transition_failure: Lifecycle transition or status progression is invalid.
error_classes.identity_drift: Immutable canonical identity metadata differs from candidate metadata.
error_classes.contract_failure: Declared contract or required surface was violated.

run_payload_contract.compatibility_projection: validation_errors remains a rendered string projection of validation_findings for backward compatibility only.
